steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The prompt explicitly states the student wants to “indicate the size” of the Maple Bend NWR. The notes provide this information: “It encompasses 90 acres.”

steps.title: Match the goal to the choice
steps.content: Choice D — A protected natural area, the Maple Bend NWR encompasses 90 acres of land in Arkansas. accomplishes the goal by including the specific measurement: the refuge “encompasses 90 acres of land in Arkansas.” The other options omit the acreage figure, focusing instead on management, habitat, or location. That matches Choice D — A protected natural area, the Maple Bend NWR encompasses 90 acres of land in Arkansas..
